design_system.rationale: Patients/customers need warmth and trust. A warm sand/cream background with deep forest/sage accents fits the earthy boutique brand identity and the user's explicit request.

rules.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl tracking-tighter leading-[1.1] font-light italic-friendly

colors.tailwind_config_notes: Map these HSL values to Tailwind's config under theme.extend.colors. Use semantic names like 'bg-background', 'text-foreground', 'bg-accent-forest', 'text-accent-sage'.

layout_and_spacing.bento_grid: Grid layout for categories: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 with gap-8. Mix tall (row-span-2) and square items. Avoid generic symmetric 3-column grids.

sections_blueprint.name: Navigation/Header
sections_blueprint.strategy: Sticky top-0 z-50. Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-background/80 with a subtle border-b border-foreground/5. Must contain Logo (Wordmark: TRIO Collectives), links, and CTA 'Visit Us'.

sections_blueprint.name: Hero Section
sections_blueprint.strategy: Asymmetric split layout. Left side: Generous typography, overline, H1, leaf motif image floating behind or near text, and two CTAs. Right side: Large high-end boutique interior image with subtle rounded corners (rounded-xl) and a slight parallax effect.

content.title: Curated finds for your home & wardrobe.
content.tagline: Home decor. Kitchen. Gifts. Swedish candy. New & used apparel.

sections_blueprint.name: About/Story
sections_blueprint.strategy: Large typography statement. Use Cormorant Garamond for a giant pull-quote style text. Generous whitespace, cream background. Include small organic leaf motif SVG or image as an accent.

sections_blueprint.name: Categories (Bento Grid)
sections_blueprint.strategy: Tetris bento grid (Mode A). 5 items: Home Decor (dominant), Kitchen, Gifts, Swedish Candy, Apparel. Use hover scale effects on images and group-hover text color changes. Each bento card has background-alt or forest green, p-8, rounded-2xl.

sections_blueprint.name: Photo Gallery
sections_blueprint.strategy: Masonry or overlapping staggered columns of store interior shots. Minimal text, high visual impact.

sections_blueprint.name: Consignment Info & Online Ordering Teaser
sections_blueprint.strategy: Two-column or overlapping layout. Left: Consignment process with elegant list/steps. Right: 'Coming Soon: Online Ordering' via Toast POS. Use Shadcn Input & Button for email signup. Dark mode card (bg-accent-forest text-white) to break up the cream background.

sections_blueprint.name: Visit & Contact (Footer)
sections_blueprint.strategy: Massive typography for 'Let's Talk' or 'Visit Us'. Address, Hours, Phone. Very large padding (py-32).

components_strategy.html: Use raw HTML/Tailwind for layouts, bento grids, and hero. Ensure organic, asymmetrical, overlapping layers.
components_strategy.shadcn: Use Shadcn 'Input' and 'Button' ONLY for the email signup form. Customize button to be rounded-none or very slight rounded-sm, bg-foreground text-background hover:bg-accent-forest.
components_strategy.icons: Use lucide-react (MapPin, Clock, Phone, ArrowRight, Mail).

hero.description: Warm elegant local boutique interior, displaying rustic home decor

motif.description: Subtle organic watercolor sage green leaf motif

interactions_and_motion.scrolling: Use framer-motion for scroll-triggered reveal animations. Fade up (y: 20) with low opacity, springing into place.
interactions_and_motion.hover: Images in categories should subtly scale up (scale-105) on hover with smooth transition. Buttons should shift slightly or change color.
interactions_and_motion.texture: Consider adding a subtle CSS noise overlay (opacity-10) over the background colors to give a physical paper/boutique feel.

testing.requirements: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Load the Google Fonts (Cormorant Garamond and Manrope) in index.html.
Configure Tailwind with the exact HSL color tokens provided in the colors block.
Do NOT use generic Shadcn Card component for the Bento grid or layout structures. Only use Shadcn for the specific email signup Input and Button.
Ensure generous spacing (py-24, py-32) and asymmetric bento layouts.
Never use generic placeholder images. Use the provided high-quality image URLs in this JSON file.
